notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Review in-app attendance, device, and recheck updates.
notifications.emptyDescription: New in-app notifications will appear here.
notifications.errorDescription: Refresh the list or try again in a moment.

login.title: Sign in
login.cardDescription: Use your work account to continue.
login.inactiveError: This account is inactive. Contact an administrator to restore access.
login.invalidError: The email or password is incorrect.

events.title: Events
events.description: Create, assign, and review attendance events from the admin workspace.
events.errorDescription: Refresh the list or try again in a moment.

devices.title: Devices
devices.description: Review employee devices and approve or reject device requests.
devices.cardDescription: Manage pending, trusted, and rejected devices.
devices.emptyDescription: Device requests matching the current filter will appear here.
devices.errorDescription: Refresh the list or try again in a moment.

users.title: Users
users.description: Create employees and admins, review roles, and manage access.
users.createDescription: Create an employee or administrator with a temporary password.
users.editDescription: Update a user's display name and role.
users.emptyDescription: Users matching the current filters will appear here.
users.errorDescription: Refresh the list or try again in a moment.

form.createDescription: The password is stored through Better Auth-compatible credential hashing.
form.editDescription: Email stays read-only for now to avoid unsafe Better Auth account changes.
form.emailReadonly: Email editing is disabled for now.
form.isActiveDescription: Inactive users stay in the system but cannot access protected app areas.

validation.password: Password must be at least 8 characters.

backendErrors.EMAIL_ALREADY_EXISTS: A user with this email already exists.
backendErrors.INVALID_JSON: User request was not valid JSON.
backendErrors.LAST_ACTIVE_ADMIN_REQUIRED: At least one active administrator is required.
backendErrors.LAST_ADMIN_DEMOTION_NOT_ALLOWED: The last administrator cannot be demoted.
backendErrors.SELF_DEACTIVATION_NOT_ALLOWED: You cannot deactivate your own administrator account.
backendErrors.SELF_DEMOTION_NOT_ALLOWED: You cannot remove your own administrator role.
backendErrors.UNAUTHORIZED: Sign in again before managing users.
backendErrors.VALIDATION_ERROR: The submitted user data was not accepted.

errors.unknownSubmitError: User could not be saved. Try again.

createEvent.title: Create event
createEvent.description: Define the location, schedule, assigned employees, and fixed recheck slots.
createEvent.employeeIdsTemporary: Choose employees from the user list.
createEvent.noSlotsDescription: Add slots only when this event requires scheduled rechecks.

sections.assignmentsDescription: Search employees and select who should attend this event.
sections.basicsDescription: Set the event name, location, coordinates, and allowed radius.
sections.rechecksDescription: Fixed slots must sit inside the event start and end time.
sections.scheduleDescription: Choose the active event window and attendance requirements.

map.currentLocationUnavailable: Current location could not be detected. Choose a point on the map.
map.currentLocationUnsupported: This browser does not support current location.
map.defaultHint: Default center is Amman, Jordan. Click the map to select the event location.
map.description: Click the map or use your current location. The selected position fills the coordinates below.
map.searchError: Location search failed. Try again or click the map.
map.searchRequired: Enter a location to search for.
map.selectedLocation: Selected location is shown with the radius circle.
map.title: Pick location on map

help.coordinates: Coordinates are filled from the map and can be edited manually if needed.
help.employeeIds: Selected employees are submitted as employee IDs.
help.requireCheckout: Employees must submit checkout before leaving.
help.requirePhoto: Photo upload is not configured yet, but the backend can require a photo URL later.

validation.employeeIds: Add at least one employee ID.
validation.endsAfterStart: End time must be after start time.
validation.radius: Radius must be a whole number greater than zero.
validation.slotsInvalid: Fix recheck slots that are outside the event window before submitting.

backendErrors.INVALID_EMPLOYEES: One or more employee IDs do not belong to employee users.
backendErrors.INVALID_JSON: Create event request was not valid JSON.
backendErrors.UNAUTHORIZED: Sign in again before creating an event.
backendErrors.VALIDATION_ERROR: The submitted event data was not accepted.

errors.unknownSubmitError: Event could not be created. Try again.

eventDetails.deleteConfirm: Delete this event and its assignments? This cannot be undone.

sections.employeesDescription: Track each employee assignment and latest attendance signals.
sections.managementDescription: Edit core event settings, change status, or remove the event.
sections.rechecksDescription: Fixed recheck windows configured for this event.

validation.endsAfterStart: End time must be after start time.
validation.radius: Radius must be a whole number between 1 and 50000 meters.
validation.required: Fill in the required event fields.

map.ariaLabel: Map showing event location and submitted proof location
map.eventMarker: Blue marker: event location and allowed radius
map.proofMarker: Amber marker: submitted proof location and GPS accuracy

sections.filtersDescription: Filter the loaded timeline by employee, assignment status, or proof type.

events.title: My events
events.description: Assigned active and upcoming events appear in this mobile workspace.
events.emptyDescription: Active and upcoming assignments will appear here.
events.errorDescription: Refresh the list or try again in a moment.

eventDetails.title: Event details
eventDetails.description: Review your assignment, planned rechecks, and required actions.
eventDetails.rechecksDescription: These recheck times were defined by the admin.
eventDetails.noRechecksDescription: This event does not have fixed recheck slots.
instructions: Arrive at the event location before checking in.
Keep location access enabled while you are attending.
Submit active rechecks from the app when they become available.
Check out before leaving if checkout is required.
eventDetails.errorTitle: Event details could not be loaded
eventDetails.errorDescription: Refresh the page or return to your events list.

checkIn.description: Capture a fresh GPS location, review accuracy, and submit your attendance.

checkIn.noRechecksDescription: This event does not have fixed recheck slots.

steps.locationDescription: Use your browser GPS with high accuracy enabled.
steps.reviewDescription: Confirm the captured coordinates, accuracy, and timestamp.
steps.photoDescription: Photo proof is only available after an upload provider is configured.

warnings.poorAccuracy: GPS accuracy is poor. The backend may mark this proof as suspicious or reject it.
